summary: Dongdaemun anchors a diverse east-central base: the Dongdaemun market cluster, Kyung Hee / HUFS universities, and mixed residential. DPK wins (안규백 52.89, 장경태 54.26) reflect balanced mix of market/working-class and university/young-professional cohorts.

issues.label: Market + university + residential mix
issues.description: Unusually diverse electorate composition anchors moderate DPK lean.

issues.label: Market-worker base (Cheongnyangni)
issues.description: Dongdaemun/Cheongnyangni market community adds working-class DPK-aligned vote.
